title: Random+Multiplied Items
description: Every block you mine, or mob you kill drops a random item which is also randomly multiplied from 1 to 1024 of it
body:
This mod is like those YouTube videos where every block you break is random and multiplied, you can get any amount from 1 to 1024 of an item. Additionally every mob you kill will also drop a random and multiplied item. Try your best to beat the game

Created originally for Baablu
